mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, username, action, resource_type, resource_id, detail, ip_addr, created_at FROM bi_audit_log ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 200
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bi_audit_log (user_id, username, action, resource_type, resource_id, detail, ip_addr) VALUES (#{userId}, #{username}, #{action}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceId}, #{detail}, #{ipAddr})
